description: After a flight test, an engineer must analyze the collected data to verify the aircraft's performance against its design model.

nodes.task_description: Import the flight test data into an analysis software.
Compare the actual measured lift and drag coefficients from the flight test with the predicted values from the CFD simulation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent plots the real and simulated data and finds they are within 2% of each other.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report summarizing the findings and confirming that the aircraft's performance meets or exceeds predictions.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a detailed report for the certification team.
